actions.name: Wind Staff
actions.desc: {@atkr m,r} +5, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 11 (2d10) Lightning damage.

spells: The aarakocra casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save 13):
The aarakocra casts Feather Fall in response to that spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

actions.name: Talons
actions.desc: {@atkr m} +4, reach 5 ft. 4 (1d4 + 2) Slashing damage, or 9 (3d4 + 2) Slashing damage if the aarakocra moved 30+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit.

actions.name: Wind Javelin
actions.desc: {@atkr m,r} +4, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Thunder damage. {@hom}The javelin magically returns to the aarakocra's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

monsters.name: Aberrant Cultist

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The cultist makes two Tentacle Lash attacks. It can replace any attack with a use of Mind Rot.

actions.name: Tentacle Lash
actions.desc: {@atkr m} +7, reach 10 ft. 7 (1d6 + 4) Slashing damage plus 14 (4d6) Psychic damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition until the grapple ends.

actions.name: Mind Rot
actions.desc: {@actSave wis} 15, one creature the cultist can see within 90 feet. {@actSaveFail} 27 (6d8) Psychic damage, and the target has the Poisoned Half damage only.

spells: The cultist casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save 15):
The cultist casts Counterspell in response to that spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.desc: The aboleth can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Eldritch Restoration
traits.desc: If destroyed, the aboleth gains a new body in 5d10 days, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} in the Far Realm or another location chosen by the DM.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
traits.desc: If the aboleth fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Mucus Cloud
traits.desc:
While underwater, the aboleth is surrounded by mucus. {@actSave con} 14, each creature in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the aboleth at the end of the aboleth's turn. {@actSaveFail} The target is cursed. Until the curse ends, the target's skin becomes slimy, the target can breathe air and water, and it can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} unless it is underwater.
While the cursed creature is outside a body of water, the creature takes 6 (1d12) Acid damage at the end of every 10 minutes unless moisture is applied to its skin before those minutes have passed.

traits.name: Probing Telepathy
traits.desc: If a creature the aboleth can see communicates telepathically with the aboleth, the aboleth learns the creature's greatest desires.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The aboleth makes two Tentacle attacks and uses either Consume Memories or Dominate Mind if available.

actions.name: Tentacle
actions.desc: {@atkr m} +9, reach 15 ft. 12 (2d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled) from one of four tentacles.

actions.name: Consume Memories
actions.desc: {@actSave int} 16, one creature within 30 feet that is Charmed by this action.

actions.name: Dominate Mind (2/Day)
actions.desc:
{@actSave wis} 16, one creature the aboleth can see within 30 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target has the Charmed, the target acts as an ally to the aboleth and is under its control while within 60 feet of it. In addition, the aboleth and the target can communicate telepathically with each other over any distance.
The target repeats the save whenever it takes damage as well as after every 24 hours it spends at least 1 mile away from the aboleth, ending the effect on itself on a success.

legendary_actions.name: Lash
legendary_actions.desc: The aboleth makes one Tentacle attack.

legendary_actions.name: Psychic Drain
legendary_actions.desc: If the aboleth has at least one creature Charmed.

monsters.name: Animal Lord

traits.name: Animal Lordship
traits.desc: An animal lord represents a Forager, Hunter, or Sage (DM's choice), which determines certain traits in this stat block.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
traits.desc: If the animal lord fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Lordly Presence
traits.desc: {@actSave wis} 20, any enemy that starts its turn in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the animal lord. {@actSaveFail} The target suffers one of the following effects:

traits.name: Captivated (Forager Only)
traits.desc: The target has the Charmed condition.

traits.name: Fearful (Hunter Only)
traits.desc: The target has the Frightened condition until the end of its next turn.

traits.name: Mired (Sage Only)
traits.desc: The target takes 10 (3d6) Psychic damage, and the target is magically bewildered until the end of its next turn. While bewildered, the target subtracts 1d4 from its saving throws.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: The animal lord has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The animal lord makes two attacks, using Rend or Radiant Ray in any combination, and uses Animal Spirit.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: {@atkr m} +13, reach 5 ft. 14 (2d6 + 7) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Force damage.

actions.name: Radiant Ray
actions.desc: {@atkr r} +12, range 120 ft. 20 (4d6 + 6) Radiant damage.

actions.name: Animal Spirit
actions.desc: The animal lord conjures an animal spirit that strikes at a creature and then disappears. {@actSave dex} 20, one creature the animal lord can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} 28 (4d10 + 6) Radiant damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} One of the following effects occurs:

actions.name: Fortify (Forager Only)
actions.desc: The animal lord gains 20 {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}.

actions.name: Marked as Prey (Hunter Only)
actions.desc: The animal lord has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against the target until the start of the animal lord's next turn.

actions.name: Pesky Swarm (Sage Only)
actions.desc: The target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and ability checks until the end of its next turn.

bonus_actions.name: Shape-Shift
bonus_actions.desc: The animal lord shape-shifts into a Huge or smaller version of the animal it represents or a Medium or Small Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Its game statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

legendary_actions.name: Feral Strike
legendary_actions.desc: The animal lord moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}, and it makes one Rend attack.

legendary_actions.name: Radiant Strike
legendary_actions.desc: The animal lord makes one Radiant Ray attack.

monsters.name: Arcanaloth

traits.name: Fiendish Restoration
traits.desc: If the arcanaloth dies outside Gehenna, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly and revives with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} in Gehenna.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: The arcanaloth has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Soul Tome
traits.desc:
The arcanaloth has a magic tome. While holding or carrying the tome, the arcanaloth can use its Banishing Claw action.
The tome has AC 17; HP 35; and {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to Necrotic, Poison, and Psychic damage. The tome regains all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the end of every turn, but it turns to dust if reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or when the arcanaloth dies. If the tome is destroyed, the arcanaloth can create a new one when it finishes a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB|Short} or {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The arcanaloth makes three Fiendish Burst attacks. It can replace one attack with a Banishing Claw attack.

actions.name: Fiendish Burst
actions.desc: {@atkr m,r} +9, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. 31 (4d12 + 5) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Banishing Claw (Requires Soul Tome)
actions.desc:
{@atkr m} +9, reach 5 ft. 10 (2d4 + 5) Slashing damage plus 19 (3d12) Psychic damage. If the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave cha} 17. {@actSaveFail} The target is trapped in a demiplane inside the Soul Tome. While trapped there, the target has the Incapacitated condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, escaping the tome on a success. When the target escapes, it appears in the space it left or, if that space is occupied, the nearest unoccupied space.
If the target fails three of these saves while in the demiplane, it becomes bound to the tome and can escape only if the tome is reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

bonus_actions.name: Teleport
bonus_actions.desc: The arcanaloth teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

spells: The arcanaloth casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save 17):
The arcanaloth casts Counterspell in response to that spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

traits.desc: The hag has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Spiteful Escape
traits.desc: When the hag drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it dies only if it is within 30 feet of its anathema (a thing the DM chooses as the hag's most hated thing). Otherwise, the hag drops to 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} and teleports to a harmless demiplane, and it can't return to the plane it left for 2d6 days. When the hag teleports away, each creature within 60 feet of the space it left is cursed. Until the curse ends, a creature has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on ability checks and saving throws, and the hag knows its location anywhere in the multiverse.

The target can't take Reactions until the curse ends.

actions.name: 1: Charm Ray
actions.desc: {@actSave wis} 16. {@actSaveFail} 13 (3d8) Psychic damage, and the target has the Charmed Half damage only.

actions.desc: {@actSave con} 16. {@actSaveFail} The target has the Paralyzed condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

Until the end of the target's next turn, the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is halved; the target can't take Reactions; and it can take either an action or a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} on its turn, not both. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

actions.name: 5: Enervation Ray
actions.desc: {@actSave con} 16. {@actSaveFail} 13 (3d8) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned Half damage only.

The target has the Restrained condition. The beholder can also exert fine control on objects with this ray, such as manipulating a tool or opening a door or container.

actions.name: 7: Sleep Ray
actions.desc: {@actSave wis} 16 (the target succeeds automatically if it is a Construct or an Undead). {@actSaveFail} The target has the Unconscious condition for 1 minute. The condition ends if the target takes damage or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it.

actions.name: 8: Petrification Ray
actions.desc: {@actSave con} 16. {@actSaveFail 1} The target has the Restrained condition.

actions.name: 10: Death Ray
actions.desc: {@actSave dex} 16. {@actSaveFail} 55 (10d10) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The target dies if the ray reduces it to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

monsters.name: Black Pudding

traits.name: Amorphous
traits.desc: The pudding can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

traits.name: Corrosive Form
traits.desc:
A creature that hits the pudding with a melee attack roll takes 4 (1d8) Acid damage. Nonmagical ammunition is destroyed immediately after hitting the pudding and dealing any damage. Any nonmagical weapon takes a cumulative -1 penalty to attack rolls immediately after dealing damage to the pudding and coming into contact with it. The weapon is destroyed if the penalty reaches -5. The penalty can be removed by casting the Mending spell on the weapon.
In 1 minute, the pudding can eat through 2 feet of nonmagical wood or metal.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.desc: The pudding can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

actions.desc: {@atkr m} +5, reach 10 ft. 17 (4d6 + 3) Acid damage. Nonmagical armor worn by the target takes a -1 penalty to the AC it offers. The armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10. The penalty can be removed by casting the Mending spell on the armor.

reactions.name: Split
reactions.desc: {@actTrigger} While the pudding is Large or Medium and has 10+ {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it becomes {@variantrule Bloodied|XPHB} or is subjected to Lightning or Slashing damage. {@actResponse} The pudding splits into two new Black Puddings. Each new pudding is one size smaller than the original pudding and acts on its {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB}. The original pudding's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} are divided evenly between the new puddings (round down).

The blob itself vanishes, leaving behind a layer of slime on everything that was within 600 feet of it. In 1d20 years, the blob reconstitutes on a random world in the Material Plane.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
traits.desc: If the blob fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

While engulfed, a target has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the blob, and when the blob moves, the engulfed target moves with it. A nonmagical object is destroyed after spending 1 minute engulfed.
While engulfed, a creature takes 21 (6d6) Force damage at the start of each of its turns, is suffocating, has the Restrained The target escapes and enters the nearest unoccupied space.

If the curse reduces the target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum to 0, the curse ends, and instead of dying, the target instantly transforms into a Red Slaad. actions.name: Animate Boulders (1/Day)
actions.desc: The galeb duhr magically animates one or two boulders it can see within 60 feet of itself. Each boulder uses the Galeb Duhr stat block, except it has Intelligence and Charisma scores of 1 and lacks this action. The boulder takes its turn immediately after the galeb duhr on the same {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, and it obeys the galeb duhr. A boulder remains animate for 1 minute or until it or the galeb duhr dies.

traits.name: Ooze Cube
traits.desc:
The cube fills its entire space and is transparent. Other creatures can enter that space, but a creature that does so is subjected to the cube's Engulf and has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the saving throw.
Creatures inside the cube have {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover}, and the cube can hold one Large creature or up to four Medium or Small creatures inside itself at a time.
As an action, a creature within 5 feet of the cube can pull a creature or an object out of the cube by succeeding on a 12 Strength (Athletics) check, and the puller takes 10 (3d6) Acid damage.

traits.name: Transparent
traits.desc: Even when the cube is in plain sight, a creature must succeed on a 15 Wisdom (Perception) check to notice the cube if the creature hasn't witnessed the cube move or otherwise act.

actions.name: Pseudopod
actions.desc: {@atkr m} +4, reach 5 ft. 12 (3d6 + 2) Acid damage.

actions.name: Engulf
actions.desc: The cube moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}. The cube can move through the spaces of Large or smaller creatures if it has room inside itself to contain them (see the Ooze {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube} trait). {@actSave dex} 12, each creature whose space the cube enters for the first time during this move. {@actSaveFail} 10 (3d6) Acid damage, and the target is engulfed. An engulfed target is suffocating, can't cast spells with a Verbal component, has the Restrained Half damage, and the target moves to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the cube. If there is no unoccupied space, the target fails the save instead.

actions.name: Possession (Recharge 6)
actions.desc:
{@actSave cha} 13, one Humanoid the ghost can see within 5 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target is possessed by the ghost; the ghost disappears, and the target has the Incapacitated, as well as the target's Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution modifiers.
The possession lasts until the body drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or the ghost leaves as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}. When the possession ends, the ghost appears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the target, and the target is immune to this ghost's {@variantrule Possession|XPHB} for 24 hours. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this ghost's {@variantrule Possession|XPHB} for 24 hours.

spells: The ghost casts the Etherealness spell, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability. The ghost is visible on the Material Plane while on the Border Ethereal and vice versa, but it can't affect or be affected by anything on the other plane.

The hag has a soul bag. While holding or carrying the bag, the hag can use its Nightmare Haunting action.
The bag has AC 15, HP 20, and {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to all damage. The bag turns to dust if reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. If the bag is destroyed, any souls the bag is holding are released. The hag can create a new bag after 7 days.

The hag casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save 14):

traits.name: Bound
traits.desc: The guardian is magically bound to an amulet. While the guardian and its amulet are on the same plane of existence, the amulet's wearer can telepathically call the guardian to travel to it, and the guardian knows the distance and direction to the amulet. If the guardian is within 60 feet of the amulet's wearer, half of any damage the wearer takes (round up) is transferred to the guardian.

traits.name: Regeneration
traits.desc: The guardian regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point}.

traits.name: Spell Storing
traits.desc: A spellcaster who wears the guardian's amulet can cause the guardian to store one spell of level 4 or lower. To do so, the wearer must cast the spell on the guardian while within 5 feet of it. The spell has no effect but is stored within the guardian. Any previously stored spell is lost when a new spell is stored. The guardian can cast the spell stored with any parameters set by the original caster, requiring no spell components and using the caster's spellcasting ability. The stored spell is then lost.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The guardian makes two Fist attacks.

actions.desc: {@atkr m} +7, reach 10 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) Force damage.

reactions.name: Protection
reactions.desc: {@actTrigger} An attack roll hits the wearer of the guardian's amulet while the wearer is within 5 feet of the guardian. {@actResponse} The wearer gains a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack and possibly causing it to miss, until the start of the guardian's next turn.

reactions.name: Shriek
reactions.desc: {@actTrigger} A creature or a source of {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} moves within 30 feet of the shrieker. {@actResponse} The shrieker emits a shriek audible within 300 feet of itself for 1 minute or until the shrieker dies.

traits.desc: If the vampire fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Shadow Escape
traits.desc: If the vampire drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} outside its resting place, it teleports into its resting place unless it is in running water or sunlight. If it can't teleport, it is destroyed. Once inside its resting place, it has the Paralyzed.

traits.name: Vampire Weakness
traits.desc: The vampire has these weaknesses:

traits.name: Forbiddance
traits.desc: The vampire can't enter a residence without an invitation from an occupant.

traits.name: Running Water
traits.desc: The vampire takes 20 Acid damage if it ends its turn in running water.

traits.name: Stake to the Heart
traits.desc: If a weapon that deals Piercing damage is driven into the vampire's heart while the vampire has the Incapacitated condition until the weapon is removed.

traits.name: Sunlight
traits.desc: The vampire takes 20 Radiant damage if it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and ability checks.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The vampire makes two attacks, using Grave Strike or Sickening Ray in any combination.

actions.name: Grave Strike
actions.desc: {@atkr m} +10, reach 5 ft. 9 (1d8 + 5) Slashing damage plus 13 (3d8) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Sickening Ray
actions.desc: {@atkr r} +10, range 120 ft. 16 (2d10 + 5) Necrotic damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the vampire's next turn.

bonus_actions.name: Sanguine Drain
bonus_actions.desc: {@actSave con} 18, one creature the vampire can see within 30 feet that isn't a Construct or an Undead. {@actSaveFail} 14 (4d6) Necrotic damage. The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the damage taken, and the vampire regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to that amount.

legendary_actions.name: Umbral Strike
legendary_actions.desc: The vampire moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Grave Strike or Sickening Ray attack.

spells: The vampire casts Hunger of Hadar).
The vampire casts Command). The vampire can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: {@atkr m} +4, reach 5 ft. 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

monsters.name: Vine Blight

actions.name: Constricting Vine
actions.desc: {@atkr m} +4, reach 10 ft. 6 (1d8 + 2) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled) Bludgeoning damage at the start of each of its turns, and the blight can't make Constricting Vine attacks.

spells: The blight casts the Entangle).

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The fungus makes two Rotting Touch attacks.

actions.name: Rotting Touch
actions.desc: {@atkr m} +2, reach 10 ft. 4 (1d8) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The necrohulk makes two Rotting Slam attacks.

actions.name: Rotting Slam
actions.desc: {@atkr m} +7, reach 10 ft. 9 (1d10 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Spore Bomb (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: {@actSave con} 15, each creature in a 20-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point the necrohulk can see within 60 feet. {@actSaveFail} 28 (8d6) Necrotic damage, and the target has the Poisoned Half damage only.

bonus_actions.name: Absorb Body
bonus_actions.desc:
{@actSave str} 15, one Medium or Small creature the necrohulk can see within 5 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target is pulled into the necrohulk's space and becomes grafted to its body. The necrohulk can have only one target grafted at a time.
While grafted, the target has the Restrained.
The grafted target or a creature within 5 feet of the necrohulk can take an action to make a 15 Strength (Athletics) check. On a successful check, the target is no longer grafted and moves to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the necrohulk.

traits.name: Demonic Restoration
traits.desc: If the vrock dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Abyss.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: The vrock has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The vrock makes two Shred attacks.

actions.name: Shred
actions.desc: {@atkr m} +6, reach 5 ft. 10 (2d6 + 3) Piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Spores (Recharge 6)
actions.desc: {@actSave con} 15, each creature in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the vrock. {@actSaveFail} The target has the Poisoned) Poison damage at the start of each of its turns. Emptying a flask of Holy Water on the target ends the effect early.

actions.name: Stunning Screech (1/Day)
actions.desc: {@actSave con} 15, each creature in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the vrock (demons succeed automatically). {@actSaveFail} 10 (3d6) Thunder damage, and the target has the Stunned condition until the end of the vrock's next turn.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.desc: The vulture has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the vulture's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.desc: {@atkr m} +6, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the skeleton moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The warrior makes three attacks, using Greatsword or Longbow in any combination.

actions.desc: {@atkr m} +9, reach 5 ft. 19 (4d6 + 5) Slashing damage. The warrior also creates one of the following effects:

actions.name: Sap
actions.desc: The target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on its next attack roll before the start of the warrior's next turn.

actions.name: Maneuver
actions.desc: One ally who can see or hear the warrior can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to half the ally's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}.

actions.name: Longbow
actions.desc: {@atkr r} +9, range 150/600 ft. 18 (3d8 + 5) Piercing damage, and the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} decreases by 10 feet until the end of the target's next turn.

bonus_actions.name: Tactical Charge
bonus_actions.desc: The warrior moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} straight toward an enemy it can see without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}.

reactions.name: Counterattack
reactions.desc: {@actTrigger} The warrior is hit by an attack roll. {@actResponse} The warrior adds 4 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss. On a miss, the warrior can make one Greatsword or Longbow attack against the attacker.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.desc: The warrior has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the warrior's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.desc: {@atkr m} +5, reach 5 ft. 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Heavy Crossbow
actions.desc: {@atkr r} +3, range 100/400 ft. 12 (2d10 + 1) Piercing damage.

reactions.name: Parry
reactions.desc: {@actTrigger} The warrior is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. {@actResponse} The warrior adds 2 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.
